name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new primitive, rendering capability, or workflow improvement.

---

## Summary

Describe the proposed feature in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What user need or gap does this solve?

## Proposed Shape

Describe the API, output, or workflow you want to see.

## Examples

Show example output, pseudo-code, or comparable tools if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

What other options did you consider?
